mapper.sql: FROM qc q JOIN lot l ON q.qc_lot = l.lot_id LEFT JOIN "WORK" w ON l.lot_work = w.work_id LEFT JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id LEFT JOIN emp e ON q.qc_worker = e.emp_id

WHERE q.qc_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_pass_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_qty > 0
AND q.qc_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND q.qc_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND TO_CHAR(i.item_type) = #{itemType}
AND ( UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(l.lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(q.qc_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') )
AND CASE WHEN ((q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty) / q.qc_qty) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ((q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty) / q.qc_qty) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END = #{riskLevel}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(qc_qty), 0) AS totalQcQty,
NVL(SUM(qc_qty - defect_qty), 0) AS totalPassQty,
NVL(SUM(defect_qty), 0) AS totalDefectQty,
NVL(ROUND( (SUM(defect_qty) / NULLIF(SUM(qc_qty), 0)) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS defectRate,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS highRiskCount,
NVL(ROUND( ( SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) ) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS highRiskRate
FROM ( SELECT q.qc_id, q.qc_qty, q.qc_pass_qty,
NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) AS defect_qty,
CASE WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS risk_level
FROM qc q
JOIN lot l ON q.qc_lot = l.lot_id
LEFT JOIN "WORK" w ON l.lot_work = w.work_id
LEFT JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id
LEFT JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id
LEFT JOIN emp e ON q.qc_worker = e.emp_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dlog_qcid, SUM(NVL(dlog_qty, 0)) AS defect_qty FROM def_log GROUP BY dlog_qcid ) dl ON q.qc_id = dl.dlog_qcid
WHERE q.qc_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_pass_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_qty > 0 AND q.qc_usage = 'Y'
AND q.qc_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND q.qc_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND TO_CHAR(i.item_type) = #{itemType}
AND ( UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(l.lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(q.qc_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{itemKeyword} || '%') )
AND CASE WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END = #{riskLevel}
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, base_data.* FROM ( SELECT q.qc_id AS qcId, TO_CHAR(q.qc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS qcDate,
l.lot_id AS lotId,
i.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, TO_CHAR(i.item_type) AS itemType, TO_CHAR(i.item_qc_type) AS itemQcType,
q.qc_qty AS qcQty, q.qc_pass_qty AS qcPassQty,
NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) AS defectQty,
CASE WHEN NVL(q.qc_qty, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / q.qc_qty * 100, 2 ) END AS defectRate,
TO_CHAR(q.qc_status) AS qcStatus, TO_CHAR(q.qc_type) AS qcType,
CASE WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS riskLevel,
e.emp_id AS workerId, e.emp_name AS workerName
FROM qc q
JOIN lot l ON q.qc_lot = l.lot_id
LEFT JOIN "WORK" w ON l.lot_work = w.work_id
LEFT JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id
LEFT JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id
LEFT JOIN emp e ON q.qc_worker = e.emp_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dlog_qcid, SUM(NVL(dlog_qty, 0)) AS defect_qty FROM def_log GROUP BY dlog_qcid ) dl ON q.qc_id = dl.dlog_qcid
WHERE q.qc_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_pass_qty IS NOT NULL AND q.qc_qty > 0 AND dl.defect_qty > 0 AND q.qc_usage = 'Y'
AND q.qc_date >= TO_DATE(#{search.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.qc_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND q.qc_date < TO_DATE(#{search.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND TO_CHAR(i.item_type) = #{search.itemType}
AND ( UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(l.lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(q.qc_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') )
AND CASE WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN (NVL(dl.defect_qty, 0) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END = #{search.riskLevel}
ORDER BY q.qc_date DESC, q.qc_id DESC ) base_data WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(item_type) AS code, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '10' THEN '완제품' WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '20' THEN '반제품' WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '30' THEN '원자재' ELSE TO_CHAR(item_type) END AS name FROM item WHERE item_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY code

SELECT TO_CHAR(q.qc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS qcDate, NVL(SUM(q.qc_qty), 0) AS qcQty, NVL(SUM(q.qc_pass_qty), 0) AS qcPassQty, NVL(SUM(q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty), 0) AS defectQty, NVL(ROUND( (SUM(q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty) / NULLIF(SUM(q.qc_qty), 0)) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS defectRate
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(q.qc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY qcDate

SELECT risk_level AS riskLevel, COUNT(*) AS riskCount FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN ((q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty) / q.qc_qty) * 100 >= 3 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ((q.qc_qty - q.qc_pass_qty) / q.qc_qty) * 100 >= 1 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS risk_level
) GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
